seoTitle: Fitzroy vs Fitzroy North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fitzroy and Fitzroy North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fitzroy vs Fitzroy North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fitzroy and Fitzroy North.
heading: Fitzroy vs Fitzroy North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fitzroy, Victoria and Fitzroy North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fitzroy North has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Fitzroy (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fitzroy or Fitzroy North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fitzroy has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Fitzroy North scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fitzroy scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Fitzroy North scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fitzroy or Fitzroy North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fitzroy North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
